title: Egg Bake
description: A make-ahead breakfast casserole that's perfect for brunch or feeding a crowd. Must be prepared the day before!
instructions: Remove crusts from bread and cut into 1/2 inch cubes
Layer in casserole: bread, cheese, bread, cheese, bread, cheese
In a bowl, beat eggs with milk and add mustard, paprika, Worcestershire, and salt
Pour egg mixture over bread and cheese layers
Cover and refrigerate overnight (this is essential!)
Remove from refrigerator 45 minutes before baking
Place casserole dish in a larger pan filled with water (water bath)
Bake uncovered at 350°F for 1 hour 15 minutes until set and golden
tips: MUST be made the day before - this allows flavors to meld
Use day-old bread so it absorbs the egg mixture better
The water bath keeps the casserole moist and prevents overcooking
Can add browned sausage for extra protein
Freezes well - bake from frozen, adding 15-20 minutes to cooking time
